_meta.purpose: Authoritative proof of live runtime capture per omd:add-reference CREATE rule.
_meta.method: Chrome DevTools Protocol :9222 — Runtime.evaluate getComputedStyle on document.documentElement + curated DOM selector sweep + frequency analysis across all elements.

tier_1_evidence: Brand Resource Center exists and is publicly linked from the footer of every page: https://www.upstage.ai/resources/brand-resource-center (HTTP 200, h1='Brand Resource Center', categories Brand Identity / Product Identity / Media kit / Our leadership).
Distributes downloadable logo + symbol PNG assets across light/dark variants via Webflow CDN and Airtable-hosted records.
Carries IP rights statement: 'All rights to the brand assets, including intellectual property rights, are owned by Upstage Co., Ltd.'
DOES NOT publish color palette / typography scale / spacing tokens / component specs. The token system is only observable via the production CSS captured here.
tier_1_negative_for: github.com/UpstageAI — 12 public repos, all AI/research/cookbook (UpstageAI/cookbook, UpstageAI/Gym, UpstageAI/mcp-upstage, UpstageAI/opencode, UpstageAI/solar-prompt-cookbook, UpstageAI/vllm, etc.) — zero design-system / Storybook / token-library / bezier-style repo

tier_2_indexes_consulted.result: HTTP 200 page, no curated entry for 'upstage'
HTTP 200 loads search UI in skeleton state, no result cards for 'upstage'

ds_verification.conclusion: Upstage operates a brand-asset distribution surface (Tier-1 light) but no public design-system specification. Production tokens are the canonical source for this DESIGN.md.

reproducibility.verify_github_no_ds: gh search repos UpstageAI design-system   # → 0 hits
